author: y4rr
content: Landed in 50723297. Four hot kernels (mm_raw/bt/at small-path, standard_attention, RMSNorm CPU, softmax CPU) now promote accumulators to f32 when T=bf16. Before: 'The meaning of life is' -> 'don' (garbage). After: 'The meaning of life is a free-line' (coherent over 5-token greedy decode). 2110 existing lib tests pass.
